description_long: This is a freestanding wooden shelving unit with four wide, open shelves supported by sturdy vertical posts. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic and robust appearance. The shelves are evenly spaced and provide ample storage or display space, with the bottom shelf currently holding a set of stacked plates and several mugs. The side profile reveals a stepped, tiered design, with each shelf slightly recessed from the one above it. The construction appears solid, with thick planks and no visible fasteners or decorative elements. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, garages, or community spaces.
description: A dark wooden shelving unit with four open shelves and a sturdy, classic design. The bottom shelf holds plates and mugs, emphasizing its storage function.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, with plates and mugs visible on the bottom shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped, tiered structure of the shelves and the thickness of the wood.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the full width of the shelves and the arrangement of items on the bottom shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the stepped profile and showing the depth of the shelves.
